title: Global Queer Community
summary: How queer spaces and conversations echoed across different stops on the journey.
body:
Certain cities can feel entirely different on the surface and still offer the same immediate signal: you can breathe here.
 
 This connection is a place to collect the people, venues, gestures, and aesthetics that created that feeling across multiple destinations.
 
 Use the city_tags column when a connection belongs to a city broadly, and use connection_tags on individual visit rows when the tie is specific to one stay rather than the entire city history.

title: Design Language Across Cities
summary: How signage, architecture, and visual systems shaped a city's personality.
body:
Some places tell their story through typefaces, transit systems, posters, storefronts, and the tiny design decisions that make a street feel unmistakably local.
 
 This connection lets you group those observations into one thread even if the cities are far apart.
 
 Cards on the map page can link here, and this gallery can link back to the cities where those design instincts felt most vivid.

title: Who Has Membership?
summary: A test connection for the Seoul city card.
body: Use this connection to verify that the top-row tag appears and links correctly from the city card.
